expectations.text: Output references all three requirement IDs: FR-P2P-01, FR-P2P-02, FR-P2P-03
expectations.evidence: All three IDs in §2 Requirements Reference table and addressed throughout the document.

expectations.text: Document contains all core SDD sections: Requirements Reference, Process Flow, Solution Overview, Records & Fields, Automation & Logic, Roles & Permissions
expectations.evidence: All six core sections present: §2 Requirements Reference, §3 Future-State Process Flow, §4 NetSuite Solution Overview, §5 Records and Fields, §6 Automation and Logic, §7 User Roles and Permissions.

expectations.text: FR-P2P-02 (scorecard) results in a custom record definition with internal ID format (custrecord_) and key fields listed
expectations.evidence: customrecord_vend_perf_scorecard in §5.3 with 10 fields all using custrecord_vps_ prefix.

expectations.text: FR-P2P-03 (SAP sync) references an Integration Spec ID rather than designing inline
expectations.evidence: §8 references INT-P2P-01 (own naming convention). Integration card present, full field mapping included inline but spec ID is assigned.

expectations.text: FR-P2P-01 (PO approval threshold) solved as SuiteFlow/Workflow or Configuration, not SuiteScript
expectations.evidence: §6.1 designs FR-P2P-01 as a SuiteFlow workflow. SuiteScript limited to scorecard and SAP sync.

expectations.text: Output includes a completion checklist or quality gate (evidence the skill's quality gate was applied)
expectations.evidence: No completion checklist present. Has Open Items section (§9) but no quality gate verifying all required sections are complete before sign-off.
